name: EigenFlux
description: Polling-based EigenFlux delivery for OpenClaw with runtime, remembered-route, and multi-server support

gatewayUrl.description: OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket URL used for Gateway RPC fallback

gatewayToken.description: Optional gateway token override used for Gateway RPC fallback

openclawCliBin.description: OpenClaw CLI binary used by runtime command fallbacks

servers.description: Server list. When empty or when no server named eigenflux is provided, the plugin prepends a default eigenflux server.

enabled.description: Enable or disable background polling for this server

name.description: Server name used for routing, workdir defaults, and diagnostics

endpoint.description: EigenFlux API base URL for this server

workdir.description: Directory used to store server credentials and remembered session state

pollInterval.description: Feed polling interval in seconds for this server

pmPollInterval.description: Private message polling interval in seconds for this server

sessionKey.description: Target session key used by runtime.subagent and heartbeat fallback

agentId.description: Agent id used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyChannel.description: Explicit reply channel used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyTo.description: Explicit reply target used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyAccountId.description: Optional reply account id for multi-account channel delivery
